consumption.rag: Prefer JSON over MD. Use entry.id / case-study.slug as stable vector-ID prefix.
consumption.discovery: Walk this manifest; per-type index.json files give compact listings.
consumption.updates: Re-fetch manifest.json + per-type index.json from knowledge.antialienate.com; re-ingest entries whose JSON changed.
consumption.anonymisation: Children + family parties are anonymised per the deciding court's convention. Do not attempt de-anonymisation.
consumption.license: CC BY 4.0 — attribute to AntiAlienate Knowledge with link.
